references.title: A multi-objective optimization approach for the group formation problem

annotations.text: The apper explores the group formation problem using 3 constraints: inter-homogeneity, intra-heterogeneity and empathy. Optimization is done using a Genetic Algorithm. Comparison wtih 3 baselines on computastional terms and in a real setting against random and self-organized methods. In both, the proposed method showed potential.
